query:
UPDATE v2_job_completed SET
                            workflow_as_code_status = jsonb_set(
                                jsonb_set(
                                    workflow_as_code_status,
                                    array[$1],
                                    COALESCE(workflow_as_code_status->$1, '{}'::jsonb)
                                ),
                                array[$1, 'duration_ms'],
                                to_jsonb($2::bigint)
                            )
                        WHERE id = $3 AND workflow_as_code_status IS NOT NULL
